title: Paintings refined
description: Replaces every painting with fresh, vanilla-styled art that blends perfectly into Minecraft’s world.
body:
# 🎨 Paintings refined

This pack **revamps every Minecraft painting** with new, hand-crafted designs that stay faithful to the game’s original charm.  
Each artwork feels natural and fits right into the **vanilla aesthetic**, making your builds feel more immersive and authentic. 🌾

### ✨ Features
- 🖼️ Replaces all default paintings  
- 🎨 New art designed to match vanilla’s style  
- 🌿 Clean, cohesive visuals that blend naturally  
- 💫 Perfect for builders who love the original Minecraft feel  

### 💡 Ideal For
Players who want a **fresh look** without losing Minecraft’s **classic vibe**.  

> Simple. Classic. Vanilla.
